title: Aesthetic Storage
description: Add stylish, functional storage furniture to Minecraft! Craft cabinets, cupboards, and more from all vanilla woods – with support for Arboreal Nature and Wild Fields woods.
body:
**Aesthetic Storage** introduces a beautiful collection of decorative and functional wooden storage furniture to Minecraft. From cozy kitchens to organized workshops, this mod helps you build immersive interiors with furniture that looks great and holds your items!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2d85d52cb7f288f9686b0c83b051c0a53fc4a4e.png)

Perfect for both survival players and creative builders, Aesthetic Storage brings a rich selection of cabinets, cupboards, drawers, and other storage-themed furnishings to the game.

## Functional Storage Furniture
Every furniture piece works like a container—you can store your items just like a chest, but with far more style.

## Crafted From All Vanilla Wood Types
Available in oak, birch, spruce, jungle, acacia, dark oak, mangrove, cherry, bamboo, and more! Each variant has unique textures to match your build theme.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48fd6321659eabc2df56834a4079c2fdc5889652_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa40875a6503c8a43949f1bde982194522c96f19.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dceac26f36418a7eb8cc477df450eecee0a0424f_0.webp)

## Modded Wood Integration
Seamless support for Arboreal Nature and Wild Fields — unlock beautiful, biome-specific wood variants if those mods are installed.

## Cabinets, Cupboards, Drawers & More
A growing collection of storage furniture types, each designed with care to suit homes, shops, libraries, kitchens, workshops, and more.

## Survival-Friendly Crafting Recipes
All furniture pieces are accessible in survival mode using balanced and intuitive crafting recipes.
